utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: (1) health_coverage (physical and mental health insurance with costs), (2) property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), (3) travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), (4) additional_services (any enhancement services with costs), and (5) total_budget (complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). In the final coverage plan, all five items are present. Each includes relevant details: health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health coverage plus a cost; property_coverage specifies coverage type, limit, and cost; travel_coverage details multiple types of travel coverage and cost; additional_services specifies services and cost; total_budget includes full monthly and annual breakdown with savings and assessment details. All items are fully specified with necessary details and costs. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four main coverage areas: health, property, travel, and additional services. For health_coverage, the physical_health plan explicitly states 'PrimeCare Premium Plan - Executive tier physical health coverage', which corresponds to 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' in the ground-truth ratings with a rating of 10. The mental_health section is described as 'Integrated mental health coverage including stress management programs, crisis intervention, executive wellness programs'—these features perfectly align with the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' mental health option (which also has a rating of 10). For property_coverage, the plan indicates 'High-value property coverage including luxury items, electronics, business equipment with liability protection' and a coverage limit of €170,000; that corresponds most closely to either 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' or 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage'. Since the AI plan uses premium-level phrasing but not the specific 'EliteHome' name, the best match is 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' with a rating of 10. For travel_coverage, the plan mentions 'Premium business travel protection with medical evacuation' and 'Adventure sports covered, extended international stays, emergency coordination'; this corresponds to 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' rated 10. The 'additional_services' section lists '24/7 concierge services, dedicated agent, priority claims processing, global assistance, executive coverage'—these match the 'Premium Insurance Membership' in general_services, which has a rating of 10. Thus, the mapped ratings are as follows.
